Question:
This study aims to investigate the relationship between serum uric acid levels (mg/dl) and all-cause mortality.
We will be using NHANES data between 1999 and 2018, the analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model use exam weights.
The study cohort will be composed of participants age in years at screening 20 years and older who meet the criteria for diabetes when an individual is considered to have diabetes if they reported doctor told them they have diabetes, had a glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) level >= 6.5%, or a fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) is 126 mg/dL or greater. 
Individuals will be excluded from the analysis if their pregnancy exam was positive. Participants with missing laboratory values for serum uric acid (mg/dl), serum creatinine (mg/dl), or  glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%), will be excluded. Anyone who reported ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy will be excluded, as well as those missing mortality data or months followup examination, will be excluded.
The primary predictor for this analysis is the serum uric acid level (mg/dl), which will be categorized into five groups based on its distribution in the study population, using quintiles as cut-offs QN1: <20%, QN2: >=20 and <40%, QN3: >=40 and <60%, QN4: >=60 and <80%, QN5: >=80%,
The main outcome is all-cause mortality, categorized as 1 or 0, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable. 
The analysis will control factors, including age in years at screening, gender, and race/Hispanic origin, which is categorized as Non-Hispanic White, Non-Hispanic Black, Mexican American or Hispanic, and Other.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression (exam)

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 1999-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
- age in years at screening >= 20
- diabetes defined as any of:
  - doctor told them they have diabetes = Yes
  - glycohemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) (%) >= 6.5%
  - fasting plasma glucose level (mg/dl) >= 126

Exclusion Criteria:
- pregnancy exam = positive
- missing serum uric acid (mg/dl)
- missing serum creatinine (mg/dl)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- ever being told they had cancer or a malignancy = Yes
- missing mortality data
- missing months followup examination

Covariates:
- age in years at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin categorized as:
  Non-Hispanic White,
  Non-Hispanic Black,
  Mexican American or Hispanic,
  Other

Predictor:
- serum uric acid level (mg/dl) categorized into quintiles:
  QN1: <20%
  QN2: >=20% and <40%
  QN3: >=40% and <60%
  QN4: >=60% and <80%
  QN5: >=80%

Outcome:
- months followup examination (time-to-event)
- all-cause mortality (1 = event occurred, 0 = censored)

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight * 4.0 / 24.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.demo_b
WHERE full_sample_4_year_mec_exam_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number,

UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_uric_acid_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t2."glycohemoglobin",
    t3."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t4."pregnancy_status_at_exam",
    t5."uric_acid_mg_dl",
    t6."creatinine_mg_dl",
    t7."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy",
    t8."mortality_status",
    t9."months_followup_examination",
    t10."gender",
    t11."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_pregnancy_status_at_exam t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_uric_acid_mg_dl t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_creatinine_mg_dl t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Include all participants aged 20 years and older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 1.2: From the above group, include only those who have diabetes
-- (doctor told them they have diabetes, HbA1c >= 6.5%, or fasting glucose >= 126 mg/dL)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
   OR f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
   OR f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude pregnant participants
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" IS NULL 
   OR f."pregnancy_status_at_exam" NOT LIKE '%Yes, positive lab pregnancy test or self-reported pregnant at exam%';

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing serum uric acid values
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."uric_acid_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing serum creatinine values
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."creatinine_mg_dl" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing glycohemoglobin values
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude participants who reported having cancer or malignancy
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" IS NULL
   OR f."ever_told_you_had_cancer_or_malignancy" != 'Yes';

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude participants with missing mortality data
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude participants with missing months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age in years at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic White' THEN 'non-hispanic white'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" = 'Non-Hispanic Black' THEN 'non-hispanic black'
    WHEN f."race_hispanic_origin" IN ('Mexican American', 'Other Hispanic') THEN 'mexican american or hispanic'
    ELSE 'other'
  END AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Serum uric acid level (mg/dl)
-- Extract serum uric acid values for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uric_acid AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."uric_acid_mg_dl"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Calculate quintile cutoffs for serum uric acid within the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uric_acid_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.2) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uric_acid_mg_dl") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.4) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uric_acid_mg_dl") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.6) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uric_acid_mg_dl") AS q3,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.8) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "uric_acid_mg_dl") AS q4
FROM temp_uric_acid;

-- Assign serum uric acid quintile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_uric_acid_quintiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "uric_acid_mg_dl" < (SELECT q1 FROM temp_uric_acid_cutoffs) THEN 'QN1: <20%'
    WHEN "uric_acid_mg_dl" < (SELECT q2 FROM temp_uric_acid_cutoffs) THEN 'QN2: >=20% and <40%'
    WHEN "uric_acid_mg_dl" < (SELECT q3 FROM temp_uric_acid_cutoffs) THEN 'QN3: >=40% and <60%'
    WHEN "uric_acid_mg_dl" < (SELECT q4 FROM temp_uric_acid_cutoffs) THEN 'QN4: >=60% and <80%'
    ELSE 'QN5: >=80%'
  END AS "serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl"
FROM temp_uric_acid;

-- 4.5 Months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 All-cause mortality
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."mortality_status" = '1.0' THEN '1'
    ELSE '0'
  END AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT 
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  a."age_in_years_at_screening",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  u."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
  m."months_followup_examination",
  mort."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_uric_acid_quintiles u ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = u."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup m ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = m."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_mortality mort ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = mort."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_in_years_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."serum_uric_acid_level_mg_dl",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
